## Canonical Import

```ts
import type {
  DOMSpec,InfoDOMSpecs,ContactObject,LicenseObject,ServerDOMSpecs,ServerObject,ServerVariableObject,
  CryptoDOMSpecs,SignOptions,VerifyOptions,EncryptionOptions,CryptoEncrption,CryptoKeyPolicy,CryptoKeyPolicies
} from '@dndhub/domspec';
```

## Core Contract

- `DOMSpec` — Root specification object. Contains: `doms` (string), `info` (InfoDOMSpecs), `server` (ServerDOMSpecs), `crypto` (CryptoDOMSpecs), plus optional `auth/router/client/security/token/sw/fluxr/cache/geo/actions/reward/payment/middlewares/source/settings/workflows/tags/error/parameters/webhooks/links/callbacks/options/ui/api/apps` and arbitrary `[key:string]`.

## Info Section

- `InfoDOMSpecs` — `{version,title,description?,root?,contact?,license?,termsOfService?,metadata?}`.
- `ContactObject` — `{name?,url?,email?,phone?}`.
- `LicenseObject` — `{name?,url?,identifier?}`.

## Server Section

- `ServerDOMSpecs` — Record<string,ServerObject>.
- `ServerObject` — `{baseUrl,url?,description?,port,host,protocol:FluxrProtocolTaxonomy,variables?,dockerCompose?}`.
- `ServerVariableObject` — `{enum?,default,description?}`.

## Crypto Section

- `CryptoDOMSpecs` — Full crypto configuration: `storagePrefix?`, `algorithmConfigs` (signing/encryption/derivation/wrapping), `sign?`, `verify?`, `encryption?`, `decryption?`, `hashing?`, `keyManagement?`, `keyPolicies?`, `blockchain?`, `wallet?`, `tokenization?`, `crossPlatform?`, `integration?`, `performance?`, `compliance?`, `rewards?`, `oracles?`, `interoperability?`, `constants?`, plus arbitrary extensions.
- `SignOptions` — `{algorithm?,encoding?,dsaEncoding?,expiresIn?,padding?,saltLength?,outputEncoding?}`.
- `VerifyOptions` — `{algorithm?,encoding?,ignoreExpiration?,dsaEncoding?,padding?,saltLength?}`.
- `EncryptionOptions` — `{iv?,ivLength?,tagLength?}`.
- `CryptoEncrption` — `{algorithms?,keySize?,ivLength?}` (plus arbitrary).
- `CryptoKeyPolicy` — `{allowImport,extractable,keyPairType,imexport,keyValidity,keyUsages}`.
- `CryptoKeyPolicies` — Partial record keyed by TokenTypeTaxonomy.

**All sub-types are fully inlined above; no further re-exports.**

**End of PUBLIC_API — @dndhub/domspec**
